headline: Snap-on Acquires Diesel Laptops for $100 Million: A Big Step for Heavy-Duty Truck Repair
summary: (The views expressed here are solely those of the author and do not necessarily represent the views of FreightWaves or its affiliates.) Snap-on Incorporated just bought Diesel Laptops for $100 million in cash. The deal closed on June 8, 2026. The move gives Snap-on a stronger foothold in the world of big truck and heavy […] The post Snap-on Acquires Diesel Laptops for $100 Million: A Big Step for Heavy-Duty Truck Repair appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Snap-on Inc (NYSE:SNA) Proves Its Quality Investing Mettle with Strong Fundamentals
summary: The Caviar Cruise screen identifies quality stocks with strong profitability and financial discipline. Snap-on Inc. (NYSE:SNA) passes with high ROIC, low debt, and steady cash flow.
